user.title: Connect EvolvIOT
user.description: Home Assistant could not start EvolvIOT pairing. Check the EvolvIOT backend connection and retry.

pair.title: Approve in the EvolvIOT app
pair.description:
Scan this QR code in the EvolvIOT app, or enter the pairing code manually.

Pairing code
{user_code}

This code expires in {expires_in} seconds. Home Assistant is polling automatically and will refresh the QR code if it expires before approval.

progress.pair:
Scan this QR code in the EvolvIOT app, or enter the pairing code manually.

Pairing code
{user_code}

This code expires in {expires_in} seconds. Home Assistant is polling automatically and will refresh the QR code if it expires before approval.

error.authorization_denied: Pairing was denied in the EvolvIOT app.
error.authorization_pending: Pairing is not approved yet. Approve it in the EvolvIOT app.

abort.already_configured: This EvolvIOT account is already configured.
